contextBlurb: Hawaii has 3 relevant bills tracked in 2025–2026 on AI regulation. 2 impose active bans or moratoriums. 1 offers incentives or deregulation.

legislation.title: Relating To Agricultural Biosecurity.
legislation.summary: This bill appropriates funding for Hawaii's Department of Agriculture to support agricultural biosecurity programs and staff positions. It has no relevance to AI regulation or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To Artificial Intelligence.
legislation.summary: This bill creates a new AI institute at the University of Hawaii to promote and advance artificial intelligence programs across the state. It is designed to support AI development and innovation in Hawaii.

legislation.title: Relating To Deepfakes.
legislation.summary: This bill makes it a crime in Hawaii to create or share sexually explicit deepfake images or videos without consent. It targets AI-generated fake content that depicts real people in sexual situations.

legislation.title: Relating To Law Enforcement.
legislation.summary: This bill bans police in Hawaii from using biometric surveillance technology (such as facial recognition) unless specific conditions are satisfied. It places strict limits on how and when law enforcement can deploy these tools.

legislation.title: Relating To Agricultural Biosecurity.
legislation.summary: This bill appropriates funding for agricultural biosecurity positions and programs in Hawaii's Department of Agriculture. It has no relevance to AI regulation or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To The Works Of Art Special Fund.
legislation.summary: This bill modifies rules for Hawaii's Works of Art Special Fund, limiting a 1% transfer requirement to original construction of state buildings and restricting fund use to art acquisition costs. It has no relevance to AI or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To The Works Of Art Special Fund.
legislation.summary: This bill updates rules for Hawaii's public art fund, limiting when money must be set aside for artwork in state building projects. It has no connection to AI or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To The Department Of Business, Economic Development, And Tourism.
legislation.summary: This bill reorganizes Hawaii's arts and cultural agencies by moving them to a different department and establishes a new performing arts grants program. It has no relevance to AI regulation or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To Emergency Preparedness.
legislation.summary: This bill establishes community emergency preparedness centers in Hawaii and creates a special fund to support them. It has no connection to AI regulation or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To Overdose Prevention.
legislation.summary: This bill establishes overdose prevention centers and related oversight in Hawaii. It has no connection to AI regulation or data-center policy.

legislation.title: Relating To Toxic Chemicals.
legislation.summary: This bill requires Hawaii state agencies to set and maintain environmental action levels for toxic chemicals and pollutants. It has no relation to AI policy or data-center regulation.

legislation.title: Relating To Emergency Preparedness.
legislation.summary: This bill creates a Community Readiness Centers Program in Hawaii to support emergency preparedness, funded by a renamed environmental and energy tax. It has no relevance to AI regulation or data-center policy.
